name: Cheese and Vegetable Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 2 (26 oz) Cans Tomato Sauce, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine ricotta cheese, parsley, green onion, Parmesan, and egg.
2. Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and onion; sauté until soft.
3. Stir in zucchini, mushrooms, basil, oregano, and pepper. Cook until vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. Mix in 2 cups tomato sauce and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Cook lasagne noodles according to package directions until al dente. Drain thoroughly twice.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. In a greased 9 x 13-inch baking dish, spread 1 1/2 cups tomato sauce on bottom.
8. Place a layer of 4 lasagne noodles over the sauce.
9. Spread half of the tomato vegetable mixture and sprinkle with 1 cup mozzarella cheese.
10. Repeat layers with another set of 4 noodles, remaining tomato vegetable mixture, and 1 cup mozzarella cheese.
11. Top with the final 4 noodles, 1 1/2 cups tomato sauce, and shredded cheddar cheese.
12. Bake for 45 minutes or until the sauce bubbles and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
13. Serve hot and enjoy!
